strategy: Do not stockpile pips. Young Morganthe Mana Burns any wizard holding 4+ power pips (or 7+ total). Spend pips as you go and hit promptly.
Do not cast Wards or shields. A ward makes Young Morganthe Power Nova and Earthquake (400 Myth) that also strips your hanging effects. Set up with traps on the boss and hit the same round.
Hit with Storm (+20% incoming); avoid Myth (60% resist).
Once Broodmother is up, she heals the Butterfly 15% every 3 rounds. Focus the Butterfly (only 5570 health) down before that matters.
Join on time to avoid the 2-turn stun.
cheatNotes: Every 2 rounds it gives its whole side a power pip and secretly flips who goes first, so expect turn order to swap.
It summons Young Morganthe first, then escalates to Roberto and Broodmother as you kill minions, so clearing minions summons tougher ones.
Joining late gets you stunned for two turns.
Young Morganthe Mana Burns any wizard sitting on 4+ power pips. Do not hoard pips.
She also Mana Burns a wizard holding more than 7 pips total. Spend before you overflow.
Casting a Ward makes her Power Nova then Earthquake (400 Myth), wiping your hanging effects. Avoid shields and time traps with your hit.
Once up, Broodmother heals the Butterfly 15% of its max health every 3 rounds. Burst the boss before this stacks.
She sometimes follows that with a Dragonblade on an ally and a -55% Mass Tower Shield on her side.
